zh.lifeSummary: 當Mareguerite de Mailly於1338年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆麥利-馬也特時，她的父親Gilles II D'Authuille de Mailly43歲，母親Jeanne De Rely42歲。她和Jean de PREURES至少有1個兒子。她去世於1386年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯普勒斯享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mareguerite de Mailly于1338年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆麥利-馬也特时，她的父亲Gilles II D'Authuille de Mailly43岁，母亲Jeanne De Rely42岁。她和Jean de PREURES至少有1个儿子。她去世于1386年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯普勒斯享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mailly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mailey
meanings: Irish: alternative Anglicized form of Ó Máille (see O'Malley ).
English, Irish or Scottish: perhaps also a Norman name, a variant of   Malley   2.

nameMeanings.name: Mareguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Mareguerite de Mailly was born in 1338, in Mailly-Maillet, Somme, Picardie, France, her father, Gilles II D'Authuille de Mailly, was 43 and her mother, Jeanne De Rely, was 42. She had at least 1 son with Jean de PREURES. She died in 1386, in Preures, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mareguerite de Mailly est née en 1338, à Mailly-Maillet, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Gilles II D'Authuille de Mailly, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Jeanne De Rely, avait 42 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Jean de PREURES. Elle est décédée en 1386, à Preures, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mareguerite de Mailly 1338 in Mailly-Maillet, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilles II D'Authuille de Mailly 43 und ihre Mutter Jeanne De Rely 42. Sie hatte mit Jean de PREURES mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1386 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Preures, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mareguerite de Mailly è nata il nel 1338 nel Mailly-Maillet, Somme, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Gilles II D'Authuille de Mailly, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Jeanne De Rely, aveva 42 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Jean de PREURES. Morì nel 1386, nel Preures, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mareguerite de Maillyが1338年にフランスピカーディソンメメイリ-メイレットで生まれた時，父Gilles II D'Authuille de Maillyは43歳，母Jeanne De Relyは42歳であった。彼女はJean de PREURESとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1386年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスプレウレスで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mareguerite de Mailly(이)가 1338년 프랑스 피카디 솜 메이리-메이렛에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilles II D'Authuille de Mailly(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne De Rely(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 Jean de PREURES(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1386년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 프레우레스에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mareguerite de Mailly nasceu em 1338, em Mailly-Maillet, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Gilles II D'Authuille de Mailly, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne De Rely, tinha 42 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Jean de PREURES. Ela faleceu em 1386, em Preures, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mareguerite de Mailly родилась в 1338 г. в местности меилли-меиллет, сомм, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Gilles II D'Authuille de Mailly было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne De Rely, 42. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Jean de PREURES. Она умерла в 1386 г. в местности преуресь, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mareguerite de Mailly nació en 1338, en Mailly-Maillet, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Gilles II D'Authuille de Mailly, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Jeanne De Rely, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Jean de PREURES. Murió en 1386, en Preures, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 48 años.
